name: tonedeck

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/daemon && npm run build -w packages/cli && npm run build -w packages/ui
scripts.dev:daemon: npm run build -w packages/shared && tsx watch packages/daemon/src/index.ts

description: Per-album parametric EQ for macOS — CamillaDSP control plane with an art-forward UI, CLI, and a Claude Code skill for natural-language tuning
author: Avyansh Katiyar
